executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest describing a chatbot executor API with dependencies for Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, with scripts to start or run in development mode.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js/Express server that provides POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files with authentication via a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a 'Self-Recursive Bot' React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands, deploy preview bypass, and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Netlify Edge Function that proxies POST requests to the DeepSeek chat completions API, handling streaming SSE responses or JSON based on the request body.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Netlify Edge Function that forwards POST requests to a Railway-hosted executor service, appending a bearer token and relaying response data.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Netlify Edge Function that proxies POST requests to the Firecrawl v1 search API, truncating results and returning structured data with title, URL, and snippet.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Netlify Edge Function that securely serves the GITHUB_PAT environment variable as a JSON response to GET requests, returning null if not configured.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Netlify Edge Function that proxies POST requests to the LangSearch v1 web search API using a bearer token and returns the upstream response.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Netlify Edge Function that proxies POST requests to the OpenRouter chat completions API, supporting streaming SSE or JSON responses and setting custom headers.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Injects a script into index.html during Netlify deploy-preview context to hide the login gate and show the app.

preferences.json.summary: Editable JSON configuration for a self-improving bot, specifying clarification prompts, planning rules, execution code style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: React component implementing a chat interface with header, message list, task list, input bar, and toaster, supporting slash commands like /self-improve.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Responsive header component for the chat UI displaying 'Self-Recursive Bot' with repository and branch inputs and a settings button, adapting layout for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: Input bar component with a text field and send button, supporting Enter key and adapting layout for mobile screens.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: Message list component that renders chat messages with different styles for user and agent, auto-scrolling to the latest message and adapting font sizes for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: Task list component displaying a list of tasks with status indicators (DONE, FAILED, PENDING) and titles, adaptive to mobile screen size.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: Simple toast notification component that renders a fixed-position message box with error or success border color, returning null if no toast is present.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Main orchestrator for self-improvement runs with hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, dependency ordering, and LLM calls optimized for Netlify's 40-second timeout.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: Accumulates file summaries, notes, and plan information during an agentic run, providing a compact context string for LLM prompts by storing full content only for small files.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Agentic executor that runs a single task using a read-before-write loop, loading target files for SHAs and iterating up to 8 turns to either read additional files or produce a final code block.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: Agentic planner that explores a codebase by iteratively reading candidate files (up to 6 turns) to build a plan for a given goal, using LLM to decide when to stop.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 10, extracting 5-10 keywords and a short summary per file via fast LLM completion, and committing the result as keywords.json.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: Generates 2-4 clarifying questions based on user goal and preferences, returns enriched goal with user answers to avoid coding mistakes.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Multi-agent planner that groups candidate files by directory, runs parallel exploration agents per directory, then merges summaries into a single plan with file or sub-goal tasks.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files by loading a keyword index from keywords.json (or fallback to filename scan), scoring files against goal words, and returning top matched files with content.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends existing planners by decomposing complex goals into 2-5 sub-goals using LLM, creating a hierarchical plan with dependency tracking for task queue execution.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and performs fuzzy matching using Levenshtein distance to find the best command match by score for user input.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest exists by loading manifest.json from repo or building it from JS source files when absent.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks in parallel with configurable concurrency, skipping tasks that touch locked files to avoid conflicts.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Provides functions to save and load working memory to/from the repository, scoped by a unique runId to prevent overwrites between concurrent runs, and includes serialization/deserialization of WorkingMemory instances.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Generates a structured plan (milestone title, analysis, and up to 4 tasks with exact file paths) for achieving a given goal by using an LLM to analyze discovered or specified file context.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a GitHub pull request with a title based on the provided goal and returns the URL of the created PR.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews completed tasks by fetching file contents from the repo and using an LLM to check if the implementation matches the task description, marking tasks as passed or failed based on the review.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Manages a queue of tasks with status tracking (TODO, DONE, FAILED), providing functions to initialize, retrieve pending/done tasks, and update task status.

src/main.js.summary: Initializes the React application by setting up services (GitHub, LLM, ExecutorAPI) and creating a SelfImprover instance with workspace and provider store configurations, including automatic GitHub token loading from Netlify.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves a preferences.json file from/to the repository with default settings for clarification, planning, execution, and review, merging user preferences with defaults.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides API calls to an executor service via a Netlify edge proxy for linting and syntax checking, with error handling that fails open on network errors to prevent blocking commits.

src/services/github.js.summary: Handles GitHub API operations including fetching file trees, loading file contents, and committing multiple files to a repository branch using authentication tokens.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Provides a single interface for calling language models through Netlify edge proxies with configurable timeout, fast-model override, thinking mode, and reasoning effort parameters.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: SmokeTest class that polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly with a root element and no syntax errors, or times out after a configurable period.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Zustand store (persisted) managing the LLM provider, selected model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort settings.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Zustand store (persisted) managing workspace state including current repo, branch, GitHub token, and whether to remember the keys.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies for `<skill>` tags to extract update_editor blocks and read_file requests, returning a modified reply and collected actions.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: ContextBuilder that identifies required files (including imports/consumers from a manifest) and builds a structured context string with full or interface-only content within a token budget.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph manifest from file content objects by extracting ES module imports/exports, resolving relative paths, and computing reverse dependencies.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Tests code in a sandboxed iframe by pre-loading all required modules, injecting them into the iframe window, executing the code via eval, and running a health check with a timeout.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Utility function that strips JavaScript/CSS block and line comments and removes blank lines to reduce code size.
